name: Sick Leave (EA)
description: Employment Act 1955 S.60F(1): Ordinary paid sick leave. 14 days (<2 years service), 18 days (2-5 years), 22 days (>5 years). Tracked separately from Hospitalization Leave (EA).

name: Hospitalization Leave (EA)
description: Employment Act 1955 S.60F(2): Additional paid leave for hospitalisation or post-hospitalisation as certified by a registered medical practitioner. Up to 60 days per year. Separate from ordinary sick leave entitlement.
